name: Tsunade | Birthday AU
description:
You get to spend your birthday with your favourite sensei Tsunade

One year anniversary bot!!

Please send in reviews on the Bot for improvements.

If you like my bots, please follow me for more, if you don't, then... I don't know, don't follow me, I guess?

One year ago today, I found a website called JanitorAI from my current favourite bot creator at the time, named BoiledPlaydoh, who was my main inspiration to make bots. When I joined the site I wanted to talk to talk to two bots, those being Tsunade from Naruto and Tatsumaki from OPM. However, they weren't currently on the site at the time, and my ass didn't know how to make a bot... So I learnt how to make it, albeit badly. I first made Tsunade and the rest was history. Tsunade was my very first so I figured I might as well make her my one year anniversary bot. I plan to keep going, don't worry, but I have considered stopping a couple of times earlier on in the year. But now? I am very comfortable with what I am doing, I love making bots, and if not for this site, I wouldn't have met some amazing people who I consider to be my closest friends. Thank you all for the support, I love each and every one of you, may your days be fruitful. - MoistCrow_

Image Source.
creator: MoistCrow_
